description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a dense arrangement of mature trees and shrubs, creating a secluded and private atmosphere. The house features a prominent hip roof with a muted gray tone, and a covered porch area supported by columns at the front. The exterior walls are clad in a neutral material, possibly brick or siding, and several windows are visible, some partially obscured by foliage. A driveway leads to a carport or garage on one side, where a vehicle is parked under a sloped roof extension. The landscaping is lush, with a mix of tall trees and manicured hedges forming a natural barrier around the property.
description: A single-story hip-roofed bungalow surrounded by dense trees and shrubs, with a covered porch and a side carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and driveway with a carport on the right, partially obscured by trees.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by dense foliage, with the hip roof and porch edge visible through the trees.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the bungalow and more trees, showing less architectural detail due to heavy vegetation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the porch and the symmetrical arrangement of trees and hedges.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
